macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Rebounds 2.8% in March After Early 2026 Losses
items.summary: Bitcoin is showing signs of recovery in March with a 2.8% gain after significant declines of 10.17% in January and 14.94% in February. The recent uptick has sparked cautious optimism among market participants.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops to $68,730 Amid Iran-US Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin experienced a sharp 4.36% weekly decline after US President Donald Trump announced potential attacks on Iran's power plants, with the cryptocurrency falling from $76,000 to $68,730.

items.title: Asset Tokenization Strengthens Investment Case for Blockchain
items.summary: Major financial organizations are increasingly viewing blockchain as a technological foundation for tokenizing real assets, creating a structural shift that bridges traditional finance and digital assets.

items.title: Large Number of Token Unlocks Scheduled for 21 Altcoins This Week
items.summary: Multiple altcoins face significant token unlocks throughout the week, including Spacecoin (36.58% of market value), Grass (5.82%), and Sahara AI (6.77%), which could impact price movements.

items.title: Smart Contract Growth Accelerates Across Blockchains
items.summary: Developers are racing to bring programmability to major blockchains, with smart contract capabilities evolving across networks as the crypto market focuses on meaningful applications beyond simple transfers.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Starfield Confirmed for PlayStation 5 Launch on April 7, 2026
items.summary: Bethesda has officially confirmed that Starfield is coming to PlayStation 5 on April 7, 2026, alongside the Terran Armada DLC and Free Lanes update, marking the game's first appearance on Sony's platform.

items.title: Crimson Desert Achieves 2 Million Day-One Sales Despite Mixed Reception
items.summary: Pearl Abyss's Crimson Desert launched with over 2 million day-one sales but faced mixed critical reviews and technical issues on PC and PS5, causing a nearly 30% stock price decline for the developer.

items.title: Marathon's Cryo Archive Update Attempts to Address Player Decline
items.summary: Bungie's extraction shooter Marathon is facing declining player counts on Steam, with the new Cryo Archive endgame map released as an attempt to revitalize community engagement.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Celebrates One-Year Anniversary with Expanded Platform Support
items.summary: Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed Shadows marked its one-year anniversary and is now available on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC, with developers discussing extensive research trips to Japan for authenticity.

items.title: Atari Funds Open TTD Server Costs, Releases Transport Tycoon Deluxe on Steam and GOG
items.summary: Atari announced support for Open TTD's server maintenance costs while releasing a new version of Transport Tycoon Deluxe on Steam and GOG.

items.title: PlayStation Plus March Games Include Monster Hunter Rise and Persona 5 Royal
items.summary: PlayStation Plus announced its March game catalog additions, featuring titles such as Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, Madden NFL 26, Persona 5 Royal, and Blasphemous 2.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: SEC Approves Nasdaq Blockchain Settlement for Equity Infrastructure
items.summary: The U.S. SEC has cleared Nasdaq's blockchain-based settlement option, marking a significant shift in equity market infrastructure and boosting competitive dynamics in trading technology.

items.title: Faraday Future SEC Investigation Ends Without Enforcement Action
items.summary: Faraday Future announced the U.S. SEC has concluded its multi-year investigation with no enforcement recommended against the company, its founder, or executives, allowing full focus on EAI vehicles and robotics strategy.

items.title: REVIVE Launches Four Exclusive Vaping Product Lines at Vape Expo Paris
items.summary: Premium vaping brand REVIVE debuted in France at Vape Expo Paris 2026 with four new lines—PURA, CLAIR, AXIS, and RELITE—featuring innovative designs, modular tech, and customizable performance tailored to local regulations.

items.title: SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic Eye Mega IPOs Valued Over $2 Trillion Combined
items.summary: Reports indicate SpaceX ($1.25T), OpenAI ($840B), and Anthropic ($330B) are preparing public listings in 2026, potentially dominating the IPO market and reshaping tech liquidity.
